response.name: Pride and Prejudice
response.description: In Regency England, Elizabeth Bennet navigates societal pressures, family drama, and her own prejudices against the wealthy, seemingly arrogant Mr.Darcy before finding true love

response.name: Spider-Man: into the Spider-Verse
response.description: A Broolyn teen, Miles Morales, gains superpowers and must succeed Peter Parker as Spider-Man after KingPin murders him.

response.name: American History X
response.description: Two American skinhead brothers from Los Angeles are involved in the White Supremacist movement. After serving 3 years in prison, one of them tries to prevent the other from being even more indoctrinated

response.name: My Life as a Zucchini
response.description: A little 9-year-old boy nicknamed Zucchini accidentally kills his negligent, abusive, alcoholic mother. He is sent to an orphanage where he will have to live with other strange kids like him

response.name: Forrest Gump
response.description: The film follows the life of an Alabama man named Forrest Gump (Hanks) and his experiences in the 20th-century United States.

response.name: Hidden Figures
response.description: Three femal African-American mathematicians, Katherine Goble Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, work at NASA during the Space Race in the 1950s and 1960s

response.name: The green mile
response.description: It stars Tom Hanks as a death row correctional officer during the Great Depression who witnesses supernatural events following the arrival of an enigmatic convict at his facility

response.name: Slumdog millionaire
response.description: It narrates the story of Jamal Malik from the Juhu slums of Mumbai

response.name: Amélie (the fabulous destiny of Amélie Poulain)
response.description: Amélie Poulain, a shy and quirky waitress, decides to change the life of those around her for the better while she deals with her own isolation

response.name: pulp fiction
response.description: It tells four intertwining  tales of crime and violence in Los Angeles.

response.name: La Haine (Hate)
response.description: The film chronicles a day and night in the lives of three friends from a poor immigrant neighbourhood in the suburbs of Paris. The title derives from a line spoken by one of them : "La haine attire la haine", "hatred breeds hatred".

response.name: Dead Poet Society
response.description: It is set in 1959 at a fictional elite boarding school called Welton Academy. It tells the story of an English teacher who inspires his students through his teaching of poetry
